Off Calendar Nov-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT AMCORD, INC. MOTION TO DISMISS PURSUANT TO CCP SECTIONS 583.310 and 583.360. Motion granted as to plaintiff David Bart only. Motion denied as to plaintiff Yvonne Bart. Court register indicates that Yvonne Bart is represented by The Wartnick Law Firm which has not received notice of this motion. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
